programme.desc: For hundreds of years since arriving in America from Africa, thousands of Blacks have been lynched or violently killed at the hands of racists, especially in the deep South. Since the end of Jim Crow laws, there have been fewer incidents of these types of crimes. But two shocking murders in Texas and Alabama in the last 40 years remind the nation and the world that violence and terror against Blacks can still happen at any given moment.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: Victim To Verdict: The Prosecution Of Alec Baldwin
programme.desc: A-list actor Alec Baldwin was rehearsing a scene for his Western film 'Rust' when cinematographer Halyna Hutchins was shot and killed. Who loaded the live round in the prop gun? And are actors responsible for what happens when the crew tells them the prop gun is safe? Watch as Alec Baldwin's involuntary manslaughter trial comes to a dramatic conclusion.

programme.title: An Axe To Grind
programme.desc: A husband and wife are savagely attacked in their upstate New York home by an axe-wielding murderer. When the wife survives, but loses her memory of the attack, police must rely on the evidence to see if her pre-amnesia identification of the killer proves true.

programme.title: Six Degrees Of Serial Murder
programme.desc: A transient turned serial killer uses Louisiana's capital city as his private hunting, leaving a trail of dead women over a three-year span. Cops struggle to stop him, until he leaves a survivor who picks him out of lineup and brings him to justice.

programme.title: Fatal Secrets
programme.desc: The mystery of a soccer mom moonlighting as an escort who disappears from Western Colorado. It takes homicide detectives nearly seven years to unravel what proves to be a cold-blooded murder and a horrific cover up perpetrated by a suspect they'd identified from the outset.

programme.title: Killer Handyman
programme.desc: A recent widower is brutally murdered inside his North Dakota home. Law enforcement quickly uncover evidence that reveals the homicide is part of a desperate plan from a person almost too close for suspicion.

programme.title: Creatures of North America
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of North America. Find out how Canada Geese can fly over 600 miles in a single day. And how the Beaver is able to build dams stretching over 2,000 ft.

programme.title: Europe's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Europe. Find out why the Mongoose is immune to cobra venom. And why 80% of the Dragonfly's brain is used to process what it sees.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most unique formations and natural wonders of our planet. In this episode, Cousteau heads to Hawaii to see an incredibly rare waterfall of lava pouring into the ocean. We'll then visit the legendary Antelope Canyon of Arizona, walk atop a unique frozen lake in Alberta, and take a magical scuba dive into a cenote in Mexico.

programme.title: Asia's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This episode features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Asia. Find out how the Snow Leopard is able to survive in the Himalayan Mountains. And why the Komodo Dragon is the largest lizard on earth.

programme.title: Animals of the Land and Sea
programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out why the Seahorse swims like an underwater hummingbird. And how the Thomson's Gazelle is able to outrun a Cheetah.

programme.title: Friend Or Foe
programme.desc: In Lexington, Kentucky, a newly wed wife parties like there's no tomorrow until a body is dumped on a golf course. In Brisbane, Australia, a mannequin on the street highlights there are fears for the safety of a missing wife.

programme.title: Romance Is Dead
programme.desc: In Poughkeepsie, New York, a Police officer discovers evidence his wife is guilty of cheating on him leading to a deadly encounter, while in Orlando, Florida, a newly wed wife gets herself a boy toy with fatal results.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: A 12-year-old paperboy's disappearance during his Sunday morning route shocks a peaceful Iowa city. Panic sets in when a second paperboy goes missing.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Maria's destruction in Puerto Rico, Justin and Ryan fly down to help communities rebuild and help families any way they can.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Move over meat-eaters. Chef Elsa Santos and Chef Keyla Nogueira go vegetarian as they bring their native cuisines to the city of bridges.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: Explore Albuquerque's electric allure! Uncover secrets of a haunted brothel, step into hidden speakeasies, savor the spicy kick of green chile and lose yourself in epic views. Join us as we journey into the heart of New Mexico!

programme.title: 60 Min Documentaries
programme.desc: A playlist of hour long VL Originals

programme.title: Widowed At 19
programme.desc: Two high school sweethearts had their love story cut too short.

programme.title: What's On The Menu?
programme.desc: What's On The Menu?

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Chefs recreate each other’s signature dish, but they can only determine what the dish is using their senses of taste, touch and smell. When the masks come off, the heat is on, with each chef attempting to cook their opponent’s creation.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Watch things heat up in the kitchen as two local chefs go head-to-head to create a three-course meal utilizing ingredients sourced from one of the city’s unique marketplaces.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown
programme.desc: Join host Rob Mariano, also known as Boston Rob from the Survivor series, as he explores the best of Beantown from classic institutions to new local gems.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: Embark on amazing adventures across America with host Kinga Philipps who takes locals out of their comfort zones to experience transformation in the great outdoors.

programme.title: Americas Most Delish
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into the Midwest's sweets. From the messy madness of puppy chow to kolaches to the infamous buckeye, enjoy the delicious confections that make the region a haven for dessert lovers.

programme.title: My Perfect Day
programme.desc: Catalina, a 10-year-old community hero with a heart of gold spends her days giving back. Today, Meaghan surprises Catalina with a day of her own, from Sea adventures to a new set of wheels and more. It's her time to shine.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Comedians, podcasters and craft beer enthusiasts Ed Bailey and Day Bracey explore hot spots, hidden gems and the best places to grab a cold brew in the 'Burgh.

programme.title: Show Me Milwaukee
programme.desc: Local radio personality, Greg Adams, wants to shine a light on all parts of his beloved city and prove that Milwaukee has a lot more to offer than people might expect. In each episode, Greg is joined by a notable personality from the community who shows him their favorite spots and the best ways to experience them.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque
programme.desc: Amanda Machon meets with a different guest each episode who will show off their favorite spots in Albuquerque and the best way to experience this one-of-a-kind city. This series is all about discovering everything that makes ABQ unique and exciting.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: Crimes, Cons & Capers explores some of the wildest headline-grabbing crimes and far-fetched escapades from across the country including bizarre love scams, high-speed car chases, risky prison breaks and more.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: This episode chronicles the history and unsung heroes from communities around the country. From science to the skies, these local legends inspire others to follow their lead, ensuring that they’re never forgotten.

programme.title: Truly Santa Fe
programme.desc: Join host Amanda Machon for a day of unforgettable adventure in Santa Fe, New Mexico! Alongside special guests, Amanda celebrates The Land of Enchantment, showcasing everything from world-class museums and restaurants to thrilling outdoor excursions.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Explore the lives of extraordinary seniors who don't let age define them. From setting records to achieving lifelong dreams, this episode of Stitch celebrates those continuing to push the boundaries and pursue passions in their golden years.

programme.title: WXII Local News
programme.desc: Get the latest news and weather from WXII.

programme.title: Game Gone Wild: The Socker Slam Story
programme.desc: A stranger than fiction documentary that chronicles a semi-scripted extreme sporting league that premiered in 2000. Socker Slam took elements of wrestling, rugby and “butts up” shenanigans and body slammed them into a soccer drama.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.desc: Makers, crafters and artists square off to create the most iconic art piece that best represents their city. From glass-blowers and chalk artists to metalsmiths and tattooers, see who Host Ashley Adams and the judges will crown the victor.

programme.title: Maker Nation
programme.desc: Maker Nation

programme.title: Only In
programme.desc: Every city has its own local flavor, culture and vibe. Only In celebrates communities across America and the people, activities and history that make each place unique. From must-try activities to hidden gems and hotspots, to dedicated changemakers, these stories are sure to inspire a deeper love and appreciation for your hometown and beyond.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot
programme.desc: No one knows a city like the locals who live there. This series taps into the insider knowledge of notable figures including musicians, athletes, chefs, artists, influencers, and others who share their best spots to hit up in the city.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Comedians, podcasters and craft beer enthusiasts Ed Bailey and Day Bracey explore hot spots, hidden gems and the best places to grab a cold brew in the 'Burgh.

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: In “Free Spirit,” award-winning bartender and host Kate Gerwin takes to the road and meets people in their workplaces and their favorite watering holes.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Watch things heat up in the kitchen as two local chefs go head-to-head to create a three-course meal utilizing ingredients sourced from one of the city’s unique marketplaces.

programme.title: My Amazing Cheap Date
programme.desc: Host and comedic actor Amy Brassette McKeon challenges two sets of couples to pass a good time on a dime in their city. Find out which couple will experience the most amazing date for under fifty bucks.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: This episode chronicles the history and unsung heroes from communities around the country. From science to the skies, these local legends inspire others to follow their lead, ensuring that they’re never forgotten.

programme.title: Truly Santa Fe
programme.desc: Join host Amanda Machon for a day of unforgettable adventure in Santa Fe, New Mexico! Alongside special guests, Amanda celebrates The Land of Enchantment, showcasing everything from world-class museums and restaurants to thrilling outdoor excursions.

programme.title: Chaos & Kindness
programme.desc: Join New Hampshire-based band Recycled Percussion as they perform acts of kindness in their community, and across the country. In each episode, you'll witness the great lengths and hilarious things they're willing to do in the name of kindness.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown
programme.desc: Join host Rob Mariano, also known as Boston Rob from the Survivor series, as he explores the best of Beantown from classic institutions to new local gems.

programme.title: Eat Play Stay
programme.desc: Experience serious vacation vibes and discover some of the most special corners of America on this guided tour of must-visit cities.

programme.title: Ballin' in Baltimore
programme.desc: Join WNBA player and Olympian Angel McCoughtry as she shows us the people and places that put Baltimore on the map. From sailing the Chesapeake, to sampling street foods, McCoughtry pulls back the curtain on what makes the Charm City so special.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.desc: On December 10, 2021, a violent tornado outbreak hit western Kentucky. It was the deadliest weather event in the history of the Commonwealth. But as families faced a bleak holiday season, hope emerged in surprising ways.

programme.title: Rickwood
programme.desc: This is the story of the oldest professional ballpark in the U.S. and the determination of its home team, the Black Barons. The voice of Rickwood tells the tale of its pivotal role in The Negro League, Black history and its legacy in American sports.

programme.title: Local Love
programme.desc: One local single experiences some of the best their city has to offer on three blind dates. Our singles may spend three perfect days out on the town, but there can only be one love match. Who will be picked for a second date?

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: There are no bounds to what women can achieve. In this episode, we highlight women from across the country who are fearless go-getters, helpers and even life-savers.

programme.title: Unbelievable
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: These criminals may not have blood on their hands, but they still leave despair in their wake. From shady non-profits to fraudulent contractors, to wide-spread postal theft, here are some of the most devastating white-collar crimes to be attempted across the country.

programme.title: Lost Innocence: The Tragedy of Harmony Montgomery
programme.desc: A police investigation into a missing seven-year-old girl in Manchester, New Hampshire reveals harrowing details that shock the state. But even more disturbing is the discovery that the tragic outcome could have been avoided.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: Love hurts: These are real-life stories of Americans who were swindled by people who claimed to love them.

programme.title: On The Job
programme.desc: Orlando expert, Brendan O'Connor, celebrates the people behind the scenes of the businesses that make Orlando a truly unique place. Join him as he rolls up his sleeves and receives hands on training while spending a day with them, On The Job.

programme.title: Stitch

programme.title: Creatures of North America
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of North America. Find out how Canada Geese can fly over 600 miles in a single day. And how the Beaver is able to build dams stretching over 2,000 ft.

programme.title: Europe's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Europe. Find out why the Mongoose is immune to cobra venom. And why 80% of the Dragonfly's brain is used to process what it sees.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most unique formations and natural wonders of our planet. In this episode, Cousteau heads to Hawaii to see an incredibly rare waterfall of lava pouring into the ocean. We'll then visit the legendary Antelope Canyon of Arizona, walk atop a unique frozen lake in Alberta, and take a magical scuba dive into a cenote in Mexico.

programme.title: Asia's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This episode features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Asia. Find out how the Snow Leopard is able to survive in the Himalayan Mountains. And why the Komodo Dragon is the largest lizard on earth.

programme.title: Animals of the Land and Sea
programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out why the Seahorse swims like an underwater hummingbird. And how the Thomson's Gazelle is able to outrun a Cheetah.

programme.title: Europe's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This show features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Europe. Find out why the Mongoose is immune to cobra venom. And why 80% of the Dragonfly's brain is used to process what it sees.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most spectacular places on the planet. In this episode, Cousteau travels to New Zealand, where he explores Auckland's volcanic field and comes face-to-face with one of the largest insects on the planet. We then head to the South Island for a breathtaking helicopter ride and a visit to a small coastal town.

programme.title: Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Join host Philippe Cousteau Jr., grandson of legendary explorer Jacques Cousteau, as he journeys to the most unique formations and natural wonders of our planet. In this episode, Cousteau heads to Hawaii to see an incredibly rare waterfall of lava pouring into the ocean. We'll then visit the legendary Antelope Canyon of Arizona, walk atop a unique frozen lake in Alberta, and take a magical scuba dive into a cenote in Mexico.

programme.title: Asia's Coolest Creatures
programme.desc: This episode features some of the coolest creatures from the continent of Asia. Find out how the Snow Leopard is able to survive in the Himalayan Mountains. And why the Komodo Dragon is the largest lizard on earth.

programme.title: Animals of the Land and Sea
programme.desc: This episode features a variety of animals found on land, and in the sea. Find out why the Seahorse swims like an underwater hummingbird. And how the Thomson's Gazelle is able to outrun a Cheetah.
